title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Rustomjee Group Holdings Services:
Rustomjee Group Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
